top_signals.title: Corporate Bitcoin Treasuries Explained: Why Public Companies Hold Bitcoin
top_signals.summary: Public companies hold bitcoin because they view it as a scarce, dollar-denominated reserve asset that can diversify treasury holdings, preserve purchasing power against inflation, attract investors, and provide exposure to the digital asset economy. The model was pioneered by Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) and has since been adopted by Tesla, Block, Metaplanet, and a range of […]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Denmark’s EIFO Invests €200 Million in EU Fund for Tech Scale-Up
top_signals.summary: Denmark’s Export and Investment Fund has committed €200 million to the €5 billion Scaleup Europe Fund, becoming the only state-backed anchor investor in a vehicle designed to help build Europe’s next generation of technology champions.

top_signals.title: Hyperliquid added to Singapore's Investor Alert List
top_signals.summary: Singapore’s financial regulator added Hyperliquid to its Investor Alert List, as a reminder that the decentralized exchange was not licensed in the region.
